# MERN Stack Project Setup Instructions

This file tracks the setup progress for the MERN stack project.

## Setup Progress

- [x] Project structure initialized
- [x] Backend dependencies installed
- [x] Frontend dependencies installed
- [x] Environment files configured
- [x] Database configuration ready
- [x] Development environment ready

## Project Successfully Initialized!

Your MERN stack project is now set up and ready to develop. See README.md for detailed instructions on running the application.
